description_A:
The Nikon ACULON A211 10–22x50 zoom binoculars deliver variable magnification from 10x to 22x with 50 mm objective lenses. The optics include multicoated lenses and BaK4 Porro prisms to support image clarity across different lighting conditions, and the lenses are made with Nikon Eco-Glass (free of lead and arsenic). A central focus knob allows for precise manual focus adjustment.

The binoculars feature a rubber-armored exterior to improve grip and provide basic impact protection, and the body is designed to be relatively lightweight for comfortable handheld use. This is a Nikon USA authorized item and includes a full Nikon USA warranty.

The package includes the Nikon ACULON A211 10–22x50 binoculars, a Deco Gear FPT100BK tactical flashlight and tactical pen set with a water- and shock-resistant case, and a 6 x 6 inch microfiber cleaning cloth — the flashlight/pen set and cleaning cloth are included at no extra cost for added value.

Was $249.95, now only $196.95 — save $53 (about 21% off). Price was higher before, now discounted to $196.95 for great optical performance plus bonus accessories.
description_B:
Available exclusively to selected customers, these binoculars feature 20× magnification with a 50 mm objective lens and a stated field of view of 367 ft at 1000 yds. The optical system includes BAK-4 prisms and fully multi-coated lenses designed to transmit light for improved image clarity. The 50 mm lenses allow more light to enter the optics, supporting visibility in low-light conditions, though they do not provide visibility in complete darkness. This exclusivity reflects access for a specific group of customers and is not due to limited stock.

The housing is sealed with O-rings and filled with nitrogen to reduce internal fogging and to limit water and dust ingress. An exterior rubberized coating provides grip and basic impact protection. The binoculars include a center focus knob and adjustable twist-up eyecups to accommodate users with or without eyeglasses. They are compatible with a phone bracket for image capture. The package includes the binoculars and eyepiece and objective lens caps.

description_A: This bundle includes the Kowa Sporting Optics 6x30mm YF Porro Prism Binoculars in black and a complimentary Kowa Anniversary Edition Lens Pen. Was $139.99, now only $109.99 — save $30 (over 20% off). The binoculars feature a Porro prism optical design with 6x magnification and 30mm objective lenses, delivering a wide field of view of approximately 140 feet at 1,000 yards. The optical system is crafted from Japanese eco-glass and all lens surfaces are fully multicoated to ensure consistent light transmission and accurate color rendition. With 20mm of eye relief and a minimum focusing distance of 5 meters, these binoculars are suitable for eyeglass wearers and for viewing subjects at relatively close range. The housing is waterproof for reliable performance in varied outdoor conditions. The included Anniversary Edition Lens Pen provides routine cleaning and maintenance of optical surfaces, adding extra value to this discounted bundle. Final price: $109.99.
description_B:
These binoculars deliver 20x magnification with a 50 mm objective lens and a 168-yard field of view at 1,000 yards. The 26 mm eyepiece size is designed for extended viewing, offering a wider visual field and maintaining image stability during use. They are intended for observing distant subjects such as bird watching, outdoor recreation, sporting events, and stargazing.

The optical system includes multilayer-coated aspherical lenses and BAK4 Porro prisms to enhance light transmission and reduce distortion. A green FMC anti-reflective coating is applied to the objective lenses to minimize reflected light and support image brightness and clarity under varying lighting conditions.

A central focus wheel allows one-handed image adjustment; the focus wheel has a rubberized surface to improve grip during repeated use. The rubber-coated housing provides impact resistance and handling stability, and the binoculars are rated waterproof for general outdoor use (excluding full immersion). A carrying case and strap are included for transport and storage.

Limited availability — only 3 items left in stock; this is a low-stock notice and not an exclusivity restriction.

description_A:
This full-size binocular, the most popular choice among customers, features 10x magnification with 42 mm objective lenses and an HD optical system.
